title: Zephyr: SX1262 LR-FHSS driver support
description:
Add LR-FHSS support to Zephyr SX1262 driver.

## Files to modify
- lichen/drivers/lora/ or Zephyr upstream lora driver
- lichen/subsys/lichen/link/ for mode selection

## Changes
1. Add LR-FHSS TX/RX APIs to SX1262 driver
2. Configure hopping sequence per regional parameters
3. Add mode switching (standard LoRa <-> LR-FHSS)
4. Dual-mode RX for gateway role

## SX1262 registers
- RegModemConfig: select LR-FHSS mode
- Hopping configuration registers
- See Semtech AN1200.62 for LR-FHSS implementation guide

## Kconfig
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_ENABLED=y
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_OCW=137 (or 336)
- CONFIG_LICHEN_LR_FHSS_CR=1_3 (or 2_3)
